channel.title: Surfaced — Discover What's Next
channel.description: Fresh discoveries, trending products, hidden gems, future tech, and daily tools — curated every day.

item.title: Govee RGBIC LED Floor Lamp
item.description: The Govee RGBIC LED Floor Lamp is a modern lighting solution that transforms any room with customizable ambient light. Featuring advanced RGBIC technology, it allows for multiple colors to be displayed simultaneously along the lamp's length, creating dynamic lighting effects. Controlled via the Govee Home app, users can choose from millions of colors, adjust brightness, and select from a vast library of scenes or even sync the lights with their music.

item.title: NovaVoice
item.description: NovaVoice is an innovative Voice OS designed to dramatically boost productivity by allowing users to interact with their computer and apps using natural speech. It boasts dictation speeds exceeding 200 words per minute and offers context-aware text generation, minimizing the need for manual typing and app switching. This tool is ideal for writers, developers, and anyone who spends significant time interacting with their computer, enabling them to work at the speed of thought.

item.title: Kindle Paperwhite 16GB (2024) Waterproof
item.description: 300 PPI glare-free e-reader with 16GB storage, IPX8 waterproofing, 12-week battery, and warm light adjustment.

item.title: Hatch Restore 2 Smart Sleep Clock
item.description: Sunrise alarm clock with a sunrise simulation wake light, white noise machine, and a sleep meditations library via Hatch app.

item.title: Logitech Brio 4K Webcam with HDR RightLight 3
item.description: 4K HDR webcam with 5× digital zoom, Windows Hello facial recognition support, and 90° field of view adjustable to 65° or 78°.

item.title: eufy Security Indoor Cam 4K Pan & Tilt
item.description: 4K resolution indoor security camera with 360° pan/tilt, AI person detection, local storage, and no monthly fee.

item.title: Echo Show 8 3rd Gen Smart Display with Hub
item.description: 8-inch HD smart display with Alexa, built-in smart home hub (Zigbee, Matter, Thread), and adaptive color that adjusts to light.

item.title: Ninja DualBrew Pro Coffee System 12-Cup
item.description: 12-cup carafe coffee maker that also brews single-serve K-Cup pods — two brewing systems in one machine.

item.title: iRobot Roomba 694 Wi-Fi Robot Vacuum
item.description: WiFi-connected robot vacuum with 3-stage cleaning, edge detection, dirt detect sensors, and Alexa compatibility.

item.title: Instant Pot Pro 6-Quart 10-in-1 Multi-Cooker
item.description: Pro-grade multi-cooker with 10 functions, 5 customizable programs, and a 28-program microprocessor — for precision home cooking.

item.title: Anker 737 Power Bank 24000mAh 140W
item.description: 24000mAh power bank with 140W output that fully charges a MacBook in 1.5 hours — a display shows exact mAh remaining.

item.title: 3-in-1 MagSafe Wireless Charger Stand
item.description: Charges iPhone via MagSafe, AirPods via Qi, and Apple Watch simultaneously — single cable setup for the full Apple ecosystem.

item.title: Google Chromecast with Google TV (4K)
item.description: 4K HDR streaming dongle with Google TV interface, Dolby Vision, and a remote with Google Assistant voice control.

item.title: Nespresso Vertuo Pop Coffee Machine
item.description: Centrifusion extraction espresso machine that makes 5 coffee sizes from ristretto to alto — ready in 30 seconds.

item.title: LEVOIT Core 200S Smart Air Purifier 183 Sq Ft
item.description: WiFi-connected LEVOIT air purifier with H13 HEPA, app control, auto mode with air quality sensor, and quiet 24dB operation.

item.title: Garmin Vivosmart 5 Fitness Tracker
item.description: Slim Garmin fitness band with pulse ox, sleep tracking, stress monitoring, and all-day health tracking on a 7-day battery.

item.title: Shark IZ462H Vertex Cordless Stick Vacuum
item.description: Lightweight cordless stick vacuum with Duo Clean power fins, 40-minute battery, and a self-cleaning brush roll.

item.title: Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Max with WiFi 6E
item.description: Streaming stick with 4K Ultra HD, WiFi 6E support, and Alexa Voice Remote with TV controls — plugs into any HDMI port.

item.title: Logitech MK470 Slim Wireless Keyboard & Mouse Combo
item.description: Ultra-thin wireless keyboard and mouse combo with silent keys, 36-month battery, and multi-device switching.

item.title: COSORI 5-Quart Air Fryer TurboBlaze
item.description: 5-quart air fryer with TurboBlaze technology for 20% faster cooking, 9 cooking functions, and a square basket for better food capacity.

item.title: Ninja Nutri Pro Personal Blender 1100W
item.description: 1100-watt personal blender with Pro Extractor blades that crush through ice, seeds, and frozen fruit — includes two 32oz cups.

item.title: Cuisinart DCC-3200P1 14-Cup Coffee Maker
item.description: Programmable 14-cup coffee maker with adjustable brew strength, 24-hour advance programming, and a 1–4 cup setting.

item.title: Tile Mate Bluetooth Tracker 4-Pack (2024 Edition)
item.description: Bluetooth item trackers for keys, wallets, bags, and remotes — ring from your phone or ring your phone from the tile.

item.title: Anker PowerCore 26800mAh Portable Charger
item.description: High-capacity power bank that charges an iPhone 15+ 9 times or iPad 3 times — three USB ports charge simultaneously.

item.title: Anker Soundcore Motion+ Bluetooth Speaker
item.description: Hi-Res audio Bluetooth speaker with 30W output, 12-hour battery, and proprietary BassUp technology for deep bass.

item.title: Instant Pot Duo 6-Quart 7-in-1 Multi-Cooker
item.description: Pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, sauté pan, and warmer in one appliance — cooks meals 70% faster.

item.title: Govee RGB Smart Floor Lamp Corner Light
item.description: App-controlled smart floor lamp with RGBIC color zones, Alexa/Google Home support, and music sync mode.

item.title: Igloo Countertop Ice Maker 26 lbs/Day
item.description: Portable countertop ice maker that produces 9 ice cubes in 7 minutes — no plumbing needed, just add water.

item.title: Solar Garden Path Lights 12-Pack LED
item.description: Waterproof solar-powered LED garden lights that auto-activate at dusk and run all night on stored solar energy.

item.title: Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse
item.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with MagSpeed scroll wheel, 8000 DPI, and multi-device pairing across 3 computers.

item.title: Anova Culinary Sous Vide Precision Cooker Nano
item.description: 750W immersion circulator with Bluetooth app control — cooks steak, chicken, and fish to exact temperature every time.

item.title: Shiatsu Heated Back Massager Cushion
item.description: Deep-tissue shiatsu back massager cushion with 8 rotating nodes, heat therapy, and adjustable speed — fits any chair or car seat.

item.title: Ring Video Doorbell Wired 1080p HD
item.description: Wired Ring doorbell with 1080p HD video, motion detection, two-way audio, and Alexa integration — no battery to charge.

item.title: Anker 521 Portable Power Station 256Wh
item.description: Compact power station with 5 output ports, 256Wh capacity, and a 100W USB-C port — for camping, power outages, and travel.

item.title: RENPHO Smart Body Fat Scale Bluetooth App
item.description: Syncs with Apple Health and Fitbit to track 13 body metrics including body fat %, muscle mass, and metabolic age.

item.title: True H13 HEPA Air Purifier Bedroom 219 Sq Ft
item.description: Three-stage air purifier with H13 True HEPA filter that captures 99.97% of particles 0.3 microns including pollen and PM2.5.

item.title: 100% Mulberry Silk Pillowcase Standard Size
item.description: 22 momme mulberry silk pillowcase with envelope closure — reduces hair breakage, absorbs zero face cream, and regulates temperature.

item.title: Handheld Garment Steamer Fast Heat-Up 30s
item.description: Portable garment steamer that heats in 30 seconds with 240ml water tank — removes wrinkles without an ironing board.

item.title: Mini Percussion Massage Gun Portable
item.description: Compact massage gun with 4 attachment heads, 5 speed settings, and 3-hour runtime — small enough to fit in a gym bag.

item.title: WiFi Smart Plug 4-Pack with Energy Monitor
item.description: WiFi smart plugs with Alexa/Google Home compatibility, energy monitoring, scheduling, and away mode — no hub required.

item.title: Acupressure Mat & Pillow Set Linen
item.description: Natural linen acupressure mat with 6,210 pressure points and a matching neck pillow — for back pain, stress, and sleep.

item.title: Sonic Electric Toothbrush 5 Mode Rechargeable
item.description: Sonic toothbrush with 40,000 strokes/min, 5 cleaning modes, 2-minute timer, and 30-day battery on one charge.

item.title: 10" Ring Light with Phone Holder & Tripod Stand
item.description: 10-inch LED ring light kit with a phone holder and 50-inch tripod — 3 light modes and 10 brightness levels for content creation.

item.title: 1080P Dash Cam WiFi GPS Front Camera
item.description: Front-facing dash cam with 1080P Full HD, built-in WiFi for phone app review, GPS speed logging, and loop recording.

item.title: Pull-Up Bar Doorway Mount No Screws Required
item.description: Door frame pull-up bar that fits openings 24–36 inches wide — no screws, handles multiple grip positions.

item.title: IPX7 Waterproof Bluetooth Speaker 20W
item.description: Waterproof portable speaker with 20W output, 24-hour playtime, bass radiator, and 360° sound projection.

item.title: Adjustable Aluminum Laptop Stand Dual-Arm
item.description: Dual-arm aluminum laptop and monitor stand with cable management holes — holds laptops up to 17 inches at 6 height levels.

item.title: Smart LED Bulb 4-Pack RGB WiFi A19
item.description: A19 WiFi smart bulbs in 4-pack — work with Alexa and Google Home, 16 million colors, dimmable, no hub required.

item.title: Desktop Cable Management Box with Outlet
item.description: Cable organizer box that hides power strips, adapters, and cable clutter — with a pass-through outlet on top.

item.title: 3D Contoured Sleep Eye Mask Total Blackout
item.description: Molded 3D eye mask with no-pressure eye cups — allows blinking and REM eye movement without touching eyelashes.
